_comment: CC subdivide cube once, then bevel a single edge between two valence-4 verts (face point of +Z face to +Y/+Z edge midpoint). Mirrors test_bevel_valence4.d. Phase 2 of doc/bevel_blender_refactor_plan.md closed the geometric gap — vibe3d now allocates 1 edge-BV per endpoint at slide-distance `width` along the back-EH (Blender's bmesh_bevel.cc:3064 analogue), splices through F_OTHERs face-walking-keyed (bmesh_bevel.cc:6850), and routes the cap-at-v triangle through the edge-BV.
